title: Dry Bulk Grain Flows - U.S. Vs Brazilian
section_path: Dry Bulk Grain Flows - U.S. Vs Brazilian
section_path_text: Dry Bulk Grain Flows - U.S. Vs Brazilian
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 44.2024 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions October 29, 2024

Chart of the Week: Dry Bulk Grain Flows - U.S. Vs Brazilian
This week, the US and Brazilian grain sectors are in the spotlight, particularly Brazil's strong position in soybean production and exports to China. Almost 90% of the Panamax shipping market is concentrated on the Brazil-China trade route.
